name: @ever-works/urlbox-plugin
description: Urlbox screenshot plugin for Ever Works - capture website screenshots using the Urlbox Screenshot API

plugin.name: Urlbox
plugin.description: Capture website screenshots using the Urlbox Screenshot API. Supports configurable viewport sizes, formats, retina rendering, and advanced options like ad blocking and cookie banner removal.

envVars.name: PLUGIN_URLBOX_API_KEY
envVars.description: Urlbox API key (optional - can be set via admin/user settings)

envVars.name: PLUGIN_URLBOX_API_SECRET
envVars.description: Urlbox API secret for signed render links (optional - can be set via admin/user settings)
